flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Nassau Community College rose 19% between 2006 and 2009 ($3.3k → $3.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Nassau Community College fell 14% between 2006 and 2009 (20.6% → 17.6%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Nassau Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Nassau Community College are 17% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($48.2k vs $41.2k).
